parameters.jsCode:
var inp=$input.first().json; if(inp && inp.ok===false){ return [{json:inp}]; }
if(!(inp.specialty_id||inp.specialty)) return [{json:{ok:false,data:null,error_code:'MISSING_INPUT',message_for_agent:'Ask which clinic to check.',meta:{version:'v1'}}}]; if(!inp.from_date||!inp.to_date) return [{json:{ok:false,data:null,error_code:'MISSING_INPUT',message_for_agent:'Ask for a preferred date range.',meta:{version:'v1'}}}]; return [{json:inp}];

var inp=$input.first().json; if(inp.ok===false) return [{json:{ok:false,data:null,message_for_agent:inp.message_for_agent||null,error_code:inp.error_code,meta:{version:'v1'}}}]; return [{json:{ok:true,data:inp._result,message_for_agent: inp._msg||null,error_code:null,meta:{version:'v1',duration_ms: inp._t0?(Date.now()-inp._t0):null}}}];
